name: A_FETCH_YOUTUBE_FEEDS
description: Fetch recent videos from YouTube channel RSS feeds. Returns new videos not seen before.

seen_file.description: Path to JSON file tracking seen video IDs. Defaults to ~/.claude/PAI/USER/FLOWS/youtube-seen.json

max_per_channel.description: Max videos per channel to process (default: 5)

items.description: New unseen videos [{video_id, url, title, published, description, channel_name, channel_id}]
